title: Immunomodulating treatments of body cavities
abstract: Provided herein are compositions and methods for treating cancer of a body cavity, including urinary tract cancer, by way of a combination of at least one immunomodulatory agent, such as a CTLA-4 antibody or TLR agonist, and optionally one chemotherapeutic agent, wherein one or more of the therapeutic agents are embedded in, and slowly released from, a biocompatible hydrogel composition.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A pharmaceutical composition, comprising an admixture of: i) a thermoreversible hydrogel having a viscosity of not more than 5000 cP at 5Â°C, and a viscosity of IxlO 6 cP- 9xl0 7 cP at 17Â°C; and ii) a zalifrelimab liquid solution. 2. The pharmaceutical composition of claim 1, wherein the thermoreversible hydrogel comprises a pol oxamer. 3. The pharmaceutical composition of claim 2, wherein the thermoreversible hydrogel comprises 25%-32% poloxamer 4. The pharmaceutical composition of claim 2, wherein the thermoreversible hydrogel comprises a thickener. 5. The pharmaceutical composition of claim 3, wherein the thermoreversible hydrogel comprises 20%-32%(w/w) poloxamer and a thickener is HPMC. 6. The pharmaceutical composition of claim 2, wherein the thermoreversible hydrogel comprises 25%-32% poloxamer, 0.02%-0.5% HPMC, 0.75%-l% PEG, and water. 7. The pharmaceutical composition of claim 1, wherein the zalifrelimab liquid solution is formulated in a solution comprising histidine, sorbitol, methionine, and polysorbate 80, and is adjusted to a pH of 6-7. 8. The pharmaceutical composition of claim 7, wherein the zalifrelimab liquid solution is formulated in a solution comprising 10-30 mM histidine, 200-300 mM sorbitol, 10-20 mM methionine, and 0.01-0.03% polysorbate 80, and is adjusted to a pH of 6-7. 9. The pharmaceutical composition of claim 1, wherein the zalifrelimab is present in a dose of 100 mg-750 mg. 10. The pharmaceutical composition of claim 1, wherein the zalifrelimab has a concentration of 0.67-10 mg/mL. 11. The pharmaceutical composition of claim 1, wherein the composition is formulated for intravesical administration into a bladder, and wherein at least about 80% of the detectable zalifrelimab is released from the thermoreversible hydrogel within about 2 to about 12 hours. 12. The pharmaceutical composition of any one of claims 1-11, further comprising at least one additional therapeutic agent. 13. The pharmaceutical composition of claim 12, wherein the additional therapeutic agent is mitomycin C, imiquimod or gemcitabine. 14. The pharmaceutical composition of claim 13, wherein the concentration of imiquimod is from about 1 mg/mL to about 10 mg/mL. 15. The pharmaceutical composition of claim 13, wherein the dose of gemcitabine is from about 100 mg -3000 mg. 16. The pharmaceutical composition of claim 15, wherein the dose of gemcitabine is up to about 2000 mg 17. The pharmaceutical composition of claim 13, wherein the concentration of mitomycin C is from about 0.1 mg/mL to about 4 mg/mL. 18. The pharmaceutical composition of any one of claims 1-17, wherein after a single intravesical administration the zalifrelimab, urine concentrations of detectable zalifrelimab exceeds 20 pg/mL. 19. The pharmaceutical composition of any one of claims 1-18, wherein the pharmaceutical composition is substantially free from zalifrelimab aggregates after 24 hours, when stored at about 2Â° C -8Â° C for at least 24 hours. 20. The pharmaceutical composition of any one of claims 1-19, wherein the thermoreversible hydrogel further comprises at least a stabilizer, a reactive oxygen scavenger, a surfactant, a buffer, and a gelation temperature modifier. 21. The pharmaceutical composition of any one of claims 1-20, wherein the therm oreversible hydrogel has a gelation temperature of about 10Â°C to about 20Â°C, in particular 13 Â°C to about 16Â°C. 22. The pharmaceutical composition of any one of claims 1-21, wherein the pol oxamer is poloxamer 407. 23. The pharmaceutical composition of any one of claims 1-22, wherein the pH of the pharmaceutical composition is from about 6 to about 8. 24. The pharmaceutical composition of any one of claims 1-23, for use in treatment of bladder cancer, wherein the thermoreversible hydrogel is administered intravesically into a bladder of a subject thereby producing a voiding concentration of zalifrelimab of at least 20-70 pg/mL in urine of the subject after at least two hours of administration. 25. The pharmaceutical composition for use of claim 24, wherein the urinary tract cancer is bladder cancer. 26. The pharmaceutical composition for use of claim 25, wherein the bladder cancer is highgrade or low grade NMIBC, MIBC, or carcinoma in situ (CIS). 27. A kit for preparing the pharmaceutical composition comprising: i. a thermoreversible hydrogel comprising 20%-32% of poloxamer 407 ii. a solution comprising 100 mg-750 mg of zalifrelimab, wherein mixing (i) and (ii) forms about 20-100 mL of the pharmaceutical composition. 28. A kit for preparing the pharmaceutical composition comprising: i. 60-73 mL of a thermoreversible hydrogel comprising 20%-32% of poloxamer 407 ii. 2-15 mL of a solution comprising 100 mg-750 mg of zalifrelimab, wherein mixing (i) and (ii) forms about 75 mL of the pharmaceutical composition. 29. A kit for preparing the pharmaceutical composition comprising: i. about 40-80 mL of a thermoreversible hydrogel 

 ii. about 1-10 mL of a mixture of a stabilizer, a reactive oxygen scavenger, a surfactant, a buffer, and a gelation temperature modifier. iii. about 10-20 mL of a solution comprising 50 mg-750 mg of zalifrelimab, wherein mixing (i) and (ii) and (iii) forms about 50-100 mL of the pharmaceutical composition. 30. A ready to use pharmaceutical composition to be administered to the patient, comprising Zalifrelimab, Poloxamer, a stabilizer, a buffer, a reactive oxygen scavenger and a gelation temp modifier. 31. The pharmaceutical composition of claim 1, wherein the therm oreversible hydrogel comprises 25%-32% poloxamer, 0.02%-0.5% HPMC, and water.
